root_text.an6.115:1.5: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ dhammānaṁ pahānāya tayo dhammā bhāvetabbā.
root_text.an6.115:1.7: Dovacassatāya pahānāya sovacassatā bhāvetabbā, pāpamittatāya pahānāya kalyāṇamittatā bhāvetabbā, cetaso vikkhepassa pahānāya ānāpānassati bhāvetabbā.
root_text.an6.115:1.8: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ dhammānaṁ pahānāya ime tayo dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an6.115:1.3: Being hard to admonish, bad friendship, and a scattered mind.
translation_text.an6.115:1.5: To give up these three things you should develop three things.
translation_text.an6.115:1.7: You should develop being easy to admonish to give up being hard to admonish, good friendship to give up bad friendship, and mindfulness of breathing to give up a scattered mind.
translation_text.an6.115:1.8: These are the three things you should develop to give up those three things.”
